title: Lorigins
description: An addon to the Origins mod that adds new unique origins like the Void King (jet plane) Magician (funny fireball guy) Hunter (ranger) Spectre (ghomst) and Aeier (air spelt wrong)
body:
Adds some new origins to the Origins mod
###   Void King
You are the King of the Void Below End, its ruler and caretaker. In the past, the Void has been satisfied with what the End could give it, but recently, it has grown hungry. Find new sustenance in the Overworld and Nether. Feed the Void.
###   Magician
The Magician is the last of a long-lost tribe of magical beings, they are thought to be masters of spells, potions, and tricks that are thought to be impossible.
###   Spectre
A ghostly remnant of a person, barely clinging on to both physicality and presence through immense effort and magical concentration. If a spectre could be compared to anything, it would be nothing but a drifting soul.
###   Hunter
You hunt things. Animals like you. You like bows. By the transitive property, animals like bows.
###   Aeier
The Aeier is a formless, whispy wind spirit, rarely seen but often around. They are mostly invisible, physically weak, and considered closer in biology to actual air than humans, though they are easily observed when outside of the open air, where they lose all of their abilities.
